description: Convert flat elevation texts into 3D survey points using TopoCal. A legacy CAD file 'legacy_topo_texts.dxf' is located at 'C:\workspace\data\'. It contains approximately 85 text entities placed at their surveyed X,Y coordinates, but their Z elevations are 0; the text strings themselves contain the true elevation values (e.g., '1853.42'). Import this file and generate 3D survey points from these text entities, ensuring the numerical value of the text is parsed into the Z coordinate. Export the recovered 3D points as a CSV file to 'C:\Users\Docker\Documents\converted_3d_points.csv'.
